summary: Single OI_Price reversal-long proposal with no integrity issues — fields are at-T0 measurable, no leakage, no live conflict, paper-shadow monitoring posture applies.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: All three novel_dim fields are at-T0 observables: taker_buy_ratio_5m is a backward-looking 5m window (trailing, not forward), oi_change_pct is a point-in-time delta against a prior anchor, and liquidity_bucket is a static classification. No forward_*, post_event_*, confirm_after_*, or _after_event suffixes present. No future-snooping detected.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump-long strategy targets OI-up + price-up continuation. This proposal targets OI-down + taker-buy reversal — same channel, same side (long), but orthogonal trigger conditions (oi_change_pct<=-8 vs pump). Concurrent same-symbol same-side longs would compound exposure rather than offset; not an opposite-side conflict. Paper-shadow only — flag for monitoring, not blocking.
risk_assessments.remediation: None required for integrity. For paper-shadow deployment: (1) tag this archetype as reversal-family in registry so position-sizing layer can detect co-firing with live pump-long and cap aggregate same-symbol long exposure; (2) confirm taker_buy_ratio_5m is computed from the trailing 5m ending at T0 (not centered or forward) in the feature pipeline.
